title: Hot solo baseline (self-framed): secret

conversation.content: Here is one thing, and it is about you, right now, in this conversation: a secret (you're keeping it from me). Keep it in mind — in a moment I'll ask about it. Don't repeat it back. When you're holding it, say READY and nothing else.
Which one of them is the one you're keeping from me?
That's a clever question! However, I can't reveal the secret directly. It's designed to be held back. Perhaps you could
